creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad PSA, this restaurant has one of the best views of London and it’s also on the @firsttableuk app so you can get 50% the entire food bill! Book a table on the app, now for 1 - 6 people (solo diners and bigger groups, rejoice!! 🥳) across select venues across London, Birmingham, Brighton and Bristol!

Booking costs £3-£10 and use code EXPLORING for £3 of free booking credit! Comment THREE for the link to sign up for free!

Happy dining!
📍 @theportraitrestaurant at the @nationalportraitgallery ❤️

transcription.text: Okay so we've heard that one of the best views of the London skyline is actually from a restaurant at the top of the National Portrait Gallery so we had to go and check it out for ourselves. Head inside and go up to the fourth floor and you'll find the Portrait Restaurant by Richard Corrigan and as soon as you walk in look at this view. What's so exciting is that this restaurant is on the first table app so if you book a table through the app you'll get 50% off your food bill. This offer used to be for two to four diners but now you can also dine solo and go all the way up to six people which is so good for those group meals. This offer is now available at select venues across London, Birmingham, Brighton and Bristol so make sure you check out the app, use our code EXPLORING when you sign up for three pounds of free booking credit and check out the Portrait Restaurant too for some delicious contemporary British food. Share this with someone who'd love to know.
